Document:
# Neutrals
Neutrals are experienced stalkers who've entered into an agreement with Sidorovich: they teach Rookies and keep the peace in Rookie Village (see [textlink="Zone Rulings" link="RuleC6Zona14"]) and he lets them stay in the bunker.
It's the duty of Neutrals to teach Rookies; it should be their primary focus first and foremost. If no Rookies need help and Cordon seems quiet, they're free to pursue other activities.
* Relations are subject to change, please refer to the faction relations program on your PDA for up-to-date information. *
* Some relationships are permanent. *
Alliances: - Rookies
